profil.deskripsi_bisnis: PT Bank Sinarmas Tbk provides various banking products and services in Indonesia. The company operates through Marketing and Credit, Treasury, and Trade Finance segments. It offers savings, time and on-call deposits, and current accounts; mutual funds; bancassurance products; and mutual funds investment and guarantees services. The company also provides unsecured, car ownership, multipurpose, working capital, investment loans, as well as simas cash fund, expansion of collateral, back-to-back credit, micro and business credit, and palm oil farmers loan; inward documentary collection, issuance, amendment, advising, outward documentary collection, discount export document, and negotiation export document; and treasury services comprising telegraphic transfer, bank notes, FX hedging, and ODA for G7. In addition, it offers insurance products; other services, such as safe deposit box, travelers cheque, simas holiday, payroll, bill payment, and giro biller insurance products; internet, mobile, and phone banking; and debit card and credit card. Further, the company is involved in investments in securities and money markets; financing; issuance of debt; and trade financing activities. The company was formerly known as PT Bank Shinta Indonesia and changed its name to PT Bank Sinarmas Tbk in January 2007. PT Bank Sinarmas Tbk was founded in 1989 and is headquartered in Jakarta, Indonesia. PT Bank Sinarmas Tbk operates as a subsidiary of PT Sinar Mas Multiartha Tbk.
